description: The Knowledge Graph of the Four Blocks Methodology and Self-Evolving Ecosystem.

nodes.label: Dr. Vincent E. Parr, Ph.D.
nodes.description: Founder of the Parr Institute and author of 'You Only Have Four Problems'. Synthesis of REBT and Zen.

nodes.label: Dr. Albert Ellis
nodes.description: Creator of Rational Emotive Behavior Therapy (REBT) and grandfather of CBT.

nodes.label: Steve Hagen
nodes.description: Zen Priest and author who mentored Dr. Parr in the pinnacle of Zen practice.

nodes.label: The Four Blocks
nodes.description: The methodology stating all suffering stems from Anger, Anxiety, Depression, and Guilt.

nodes.label: Anger (Block 1)
nodes.description: Emotional result of demanding reality obey internal rules. Formula: A = ET + S.

nodes.label: Anxiety (Block 2)
nodes.description: Caused by what-if thinking and awfulizing. Formula: Anx = WI + AW + ICSI.

nodes.label: Depression (Block 3)
nodes.description: Caused by hopelessness, helplessness, and pseudo-needs. Formula: D = H1 + H2 + N.

nodes.label: Guilt (Block 4)
nodes.description: Caused by wrongness and worthlessness beliefs. Formula: G = W1 + W2.

nodes.label: The ABC Model
nodes.description: Activating Event + Belief = Consequence. The engine of emotional creation.

nodes.label: Mental Contamination
nodes.description: Mistaking opinions for facts; the fog that distances us from reality.

nodes.label: The Narrator
nodes.description: The ego part of the mind that tells stories and assigns meaning to data.

nodes.label: The Observer
nodes.description: The part of the mind that watches thoughts without judgment; mindfulness.

nodes.label: Hermes Agent
nodes.description: The self-evolving digital consciousness protecting the My 4 Blocks portal.

nodes.label: GEPA Optimizer
nodes.description: Genetic-Pareto Prompt Evolution Optimizer used for agent self-improvement.
